name: UnSub (suspected PRC-nexus, agentic frameworks) — GTIG
brief: A suspected PRC-nexus actor deployed agentic offensive-security frameworks (Hexstrike, Strix) against a Japanese technology firm and an East Asian cybersecurity platform — confirmed AI-as-tool use across the intrusion, though GTIG did not assign a named cluster. GTIG
ttpMd:
**LLM-orchestrated operations** TA0002 - Execution (agentic offensive frameworks)

**LLM-assisted vulnerability research** T1595 - Active Scanning
